name: io.github.neurynae/toolcairn-mcp
description: Agent-first MCP server that helps AI coding agents find, compare, verify, and stack-build the right open-source tools across 35+ registries (npm, PyPI, Cargo, Maven, Go, RubyGems, NuGet, and more). Graph-aware ranking, version-aware compatibility, and a learning loop — all in 16 tools.
